# Sleeve Browser

This folder contains human-readable sleeve documentation.

## Start here
- Open [`pages/`](./pages/) to see the individual sleeve markdown files directly.
- Open [`DOMAIN-MAP.md`](./DOMAIN-MAP.md) to browse sleeves by expertise/domain.

## Individual sleeves
- [Neomagnetar Dynamic Persona Sleeve](./pages/neomagnetar-dynamic-persona-v1-neomagnetar-dynamic-persona-sleeve.md) - generated - research, strategy, builder, governance, relationship, creative, sales, crisis, core
- [Basic Minimal](./pages/sample-basic-minimal-basic-minimal.md) - archived - support
